title: USNI News
description: The site is staffed by a myriad of contributors who range from professional journalists, national security analysts and active and retired service members. If you are interested in adding your voice to our forum, please contact our staff. CEO & Publisher RADM Raymond A. Spicer, USN (Ret.) Staff Writers Sam LaGrone Mallory Shelbourne Heather Mongilio USNI News Managing Editor Caitlyn Burchett Contributors
text:
The site is staffed by a myriad of contributors who range from professional journalists, national security analysts and active and retired service members.
If you are interested in adding your voice to our forum, please contact our staff.
